title: Cobblemon Extra Shiny
description: Adds an extra rarer shiny coloration.
body:
# Cobblemon Extra Shiny
**Cobblemon Extra Shiny** adds a new, rarer variant of Shiny Pokemon with a different coloration. These extra shinies have a 1/8 chance of replacing a regular shiny pokemon, with currently **93** compatible species:
[Click here for a list of all extra shinies.](https://pokedextracker.com/u/feltcobblemon/cobblemon-extra-shiny-list)

## Installation
Download and place the .zip in your world's "datapacks" folder and in your "resourcepacks" folder.
